LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCQUILLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEPTEMBER 28, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-21-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCQUILLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES WHETHER DEFENDANT REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED HIS DUTY OF CARE BY NOT FOLLOWING UP ON THE MATTER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: YULIYA MAGOMEDOV, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF SANDFORD CIPINKO, 415.693.9905, FOR PLAINTIFF MARCUS MUENCH.
DAVID WINNETT, ESQ., HINSHAW & CULBERTSON, 415.362.6000, FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCQUILLER.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCQUILLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There are triable issues whether defendant represented plaintiff and whether defendant breached his duty of care by not following up on the matter. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Continued To Sep-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MCQUILLER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued on the court's own motion to September 28, 2012 at 9:30 am. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
